{{< include README.qmd >}}

---

WIP

Streamlining Nextflow workflows with a Python-based command line interface.
How we use our Nextflow template, CCBR/Tools package, and CCBR/actions repositories to develop our bioinformatics workflows with reusable, modular, and reproducible components. 
Reusable github actions, python functions, and nextflow modules.
Tie every part (anatomy) into how it relates to best practices in research software engineering.
